content: {"business_logic": "L\u00f3gica de negocio para POSView.", "dependencies": ["react", "lucide-react", "@/lib/utils", "sonner", "@/components/ui/SearchBar", "@/components/ui/ActionMenu", "@/components/ui/atomic", "./POSTableView", "@/components/ui/ViewSwitcher", "@/components/ui/StateRenderer", "@/components/ui/skeleton", "framer-motion", "@/hooks/logic/usePOSProducts", "@/hooks/ui/useMobile", "@/components/ui/Portal", "@/components/ui/BaseModal", "@/components/ui/atomic", "./POSCart", "./StickyCartSummary", "./usePOSView", "@/components/ui/QueryInspector", "@/components/modals/PriceSelectorModal", "@/components/modals/BarcodeScanner", "@/components/ui/SpeedDial", "@/types"], "domain": "UI", "exports": [], "id": "src/components/views/terminal/views/pos/POSView.tsx", "name": "POSView.tsx", "technical_description": "M\u00f3dulo t\u00e9cnico POSView.", "user_description": "Elemento de la interfaz de usuario para interactuar con POSView.tsx."}
